mapper.select: select count(*) from dish where category_id=#{categoryId};
mapper.insert: insert into dish (id, name, category_id, price, code, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{id},#{name},#{categoryId},#{price},#{code},#{image},#{description},#{status},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser});
mapper.update:
update dish
name=#{name},
category_id=#{categoryId},
price=#{price},
code=#{code},
image=#{image},
description=#{description},
sort=#{sort},
update_time=#{updateTime},update_user=#{updateUser}
where id=#{id};
mapper.select: select * from dish where category_id=#{categoryId} and status=1 order by sort,update_time desc;
